# Claude Blog

> Index of articles published on https://claude.com/blog. Product news, best practices, and stories for teams building with Claude. Auto-generated daily from the source site.

## Articles

- [Agent Harness Design: 3 Patterns for Harnessing Claude's Intelligence | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/harnessing-claudes-intelligence): Agent harness design is deciding what scaffolding your agent needs—and what it doesn't. Three patterns from Anthropic for building harnesses that improve as Claude does.
- [Base44 uses Claude Fable 5 for its hardest engineering work | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/working-at-the-frontier-why-base44-trusts-claude-fable-5-with-their-most-challenging-engineering-work): Why Base44 trusts Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 with its most complex product and engineering tasks.
- [Bringing Claude Code and Claude Cowork to government | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/bringing-claude-code-and-claude-cowork-to-government): Claude Code and Claude Cowork from Anthropic are now available in public beta in Claude for Government Desktop
- [CISO's guide to agentic AI | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/ciso-guide-to-agentic-ai): Anthropic's Deputy CISO shares a four-question framework for assessing agentic AI risk, and walks through controls that keep agent deployments bounded and auditable.
- [Claude Code effort level and model selection | Claude | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/claude-model-and-effort-level-in-claude-code): Anthropic's guide to the Claude Code effort level and model selection: when to raise or lower effort—low, medium, high, and max—and how to choose between Claude Fable, Opus, and Sonnet.
- [Claude Code now supports artifacts | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/artifacts-in-claude-code): Preview your in-progress work in Claude Code as a live, interactive artifact—built from your full session context and shareable with your team.
- [Claude Cowork on web and mobile: hand off work anywhere | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/cowork-web-mobile): Claude Cowork from Anthropic is rolling out to web and mobile. Hand Claude a task, close the laptop, and the work keeps going, while every decision still comes to you.
- [Claude Managed Agents: get to production 10x faster | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/claude-managed-agents): Claude Managed Agents is Anthropic's suite of composable APIs for building and deploying cloud-hosted agents at scale. See what's new and how to get started.
- [Claude support for Apple's Foundation Models framework | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/claude-for-foundation-models): A new Swift package connects Apple's Foundation Models framework to Claude. Hand off complex reasoning from on-device models with typed Swift outputs.
- [How Anthropic runs large-scale code migrations with Claude Code | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/ai-code-migration): A step-by-step guide to running large code migrations with AI agents — including Bun's million-line Zig-to-Rust port.
- [How Anthropic secures its AI-native software development lifecycle | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/how-anthropic-secures-its-ai-native-software-development-lifecycle): Anthropic Deputy CISO, Jason Clinton, details how the Security Engineering team secures a SDLC that has AI authoring 80% of merged code.
- [How Cursor knew Claude Fable 5 was ready for the hardest 1% of problems | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/working-at-the-frontier-cursor): How Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 beat CursorBench and expanded what's possible for Cursor and agentic coding.
- [How Datadog built a “universal machine tool” for Claude Code | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/how-datadog-built-a-universal-machine-tool-for-claude-code): Datadog has an agent write specifications for a deterministic kernel to write application code
- [How Rakuten builds agents overnight with Claude Fable 5 | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/working-at-the-frontier-rakuten): Why Rakuten thinks Claude Fable 5 is a step change in model intelligence, transforming how long-running work is done.
- [Memory for Claude Managed Agents: agents that learn across sessions | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/claude-managed-agents-memory): Memory for Claude Managed Agents is a built-in memory layer that lets agents learn across sessions, improve over time, and share what they've learned.
- [New connectors in Claude for everyday life | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/connectors-for-everyday-life): Claude now connects to the apps you use every week, including AllTrails, Instacart, Audible, Booking.com, and TripAdvisor. Ask, and Claude brings in the right app.
- [New in Claude Managed Agents: dreaming, outcomes, and multiagent orchestration | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/new-in-claude-managed-agents): Dreaming, outcomes, and multiagent orchestration are now available in Claude Managed Agents. Build agents that learn, meet a quality bar, and work in parallel.
- [New in Claude Managed Agents: self-hosted sandboxes and MCP tunnels | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/claude-managed-agents-updates): Claude Managed Agents can now operate in a sandbox you control and connect to your private Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers
- [Preparing your security program for AI-accelerated offense | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/preparing-your-security-program-for-ai-accelerated-offense): We share our initial set of recommendations to shore up your defenses based on our own findings and security practices.
- [Redesigning Claude Code on desktop for parallel agents | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/claude-code-desktop-redesign): Today, we're releasing a redesign of the Claude Code desktop app, built to help you run more Claude Code tasks at once.
- [Using Claude Cowork in marketing operations to automate reporting and campaign building | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/how-anthropics-marketing-operations-team-uses-claude-cowork-to-automate-reporting-and-campaign-builds): How the marketing operations team at Anthropic uses Claude Cowork to automate marketing reporting and marketing campaign builds.
- [Working at the frontier: How Cognition trusts Claude Fable 5 to work through the night | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/working-at-the-frontier-how-cognition-trusts-claude-fable-5-to-work-through-the-night): Cognition tested Claude Fable 5 in Devin, its AI software engineer. It's the first model its team trusts to run unattended for eight hours and deliver production-ready code.
- [Working at the frontier: How Hebbia builds AI for financial diligence that can't miss a detail | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/working-at-the-frontier-how-hebbia-builds-ai-for-financial-diligence-that-cant-miss-a-detail): How Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 beat Hebbia's finance-specific model evaluations, achieving their biggest accuracy gain yet.
- [Working at the frontier: How Thomson Reuters builds AI for high- stakes professional work | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/working-at-the-frontier-how-thomson-reuters-builds-ai-for-high--stakes-professional-work): Why the team at Thomson Reuters considers Claude Fable 5 a critical evolution in what’s possible with AI for knowledge work.‍
- [Working with Claude Fable 5 in Claude Cowork | Claude by Anthropic](https://claude.com/blog/working-with-claude-fable-5-in-claude-cowork): Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 can carry long, complex work on its own. Here's how to get the most out of it in Claude Cowork.
